{{Quote|As clan leader for my people, I encourage the Airam Council's decision to ally with the Rebel Alliance. For too long we have lived under the burden of Imperial Law and Tariffs. Yes, it is true that the Imperial presence has always been low in this sector. But has no one else noticed the Armarda of war-ships that are beginning to patrol our borders, or the garrison of troops now stationed at our spaceports? I tell you now that the Empire will stop at nothing to find the Rebels, and will crush anyone who gets in its way. How long will we sit idly by and let them take advantage of us? The time for action is now. With our combined strength, the Airam clans and the Rebellion can win back this sector, and establish the free trade routes that have been our livelihood. There is a time for peace, my friends, and there is a time for war. The time for war is now!|Tamaron|<ref name="BoP">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{C|game manual}}</ref>}}
'''Tamaron''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] clan leader of the [[Airam (group)|Airam]] who agreed to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during their [[Spreading the Rebellion|campaign]] into the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]]. It was Tamaron's engineers who helped the Alliance to transfer gravity wells from a stolen [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] to a [[Modified Strike Cruiser]] at the Airam factory facility [[Gallofree]]. Later, Tamaron agreed to supply the Rebel Alliance with much needed warheads.<ref name="BoP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
